text:
between the banks of the Prayaga (near Allahabad) and the town of
Avanti as well as the forest of Puskara will be destroyed. In the
northern region too people .will come to grief as far as the Devika
river; and those who live in the Madhyadesa (Middle Country)
will be killed in large numbers. In other countries too people will
perish here and there as a result of diseases and famine. These effects
will be felt for ten months. According to others they will be experi-
enced for 18 months. In all cases the period is to be counted
after three fortnights of the appearance of a comet.

There is another comet named Svetaketu, whose crest is turned
to the south, and which rises in the east at midnight. There is

On Comets XI 135
yet another comet named Ka in the form of a yoke, which rises in
the west. Both these can be seen at the same time for a period of
